ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_no" TEXT /* Flight number assigned to the flight */,
  "origin" TEXT /* IATA code of the departure airport */,
  "destination" TEXT /* IATA code of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "ready_time" TEXT /* Time when the aircraft is ready for departure */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft assigned to the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot assigned to the flight */,
  "copilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot assigned to the flight */,
  "cabin_crew_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of IDs of the cabin crew assigned to the flight */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the airport */,
  "baggage_claim_number" TEXT /* Baggage claim number at the destination airport */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the flight */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., Scheduled, Boarding, In Air, Landed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("iata_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* Timezone offset from UTC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  "total_flight_hours" TEXT /* Total flight hours of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight status entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "departure_delay" INTEGER /* Delay in minutes for departure */,
  "arrival_delay" INTEGER /* Delay in minutes for arrival */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "gate_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual gate departure time */,
  "gate_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual gate arrival time */,
  "reason_for_delay" TEXT /* Reason for any delays */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any cancellations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_manifest" (
  "manifest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger manifest entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Booking reference number */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Assigned seat number */,
  "check_in_status" TEXT /* Check-in status of the passenger (e.g., Checked In, Not Checked In) */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "baggage_weight" TEXT /* Total weight of the passenger's baggage */,
  "meal_preference" TEXT /* Meal preference of the passenger */,
  "special_assistance" TEXT /* Special assistance required by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_manifest_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
column_names: Flight number assigned to the flight
